rag_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use visible feature names and legal identifiers when defining assumptions and guarantees
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or named constants are provided
Ensure helper declarations match the actual types of expressions used in contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AADL scope rules: component types for port contracts, implementations for binding-specific contracts
Define boolean helper variables using comparison expressions with proper type alignment
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level port contracts in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation
